title: The pharmacopoeia universalis; or, complete encyclopedia of the materia medica. Contained in the pharmacopoeias of London, Edinburgh, and Dublin, as well as of all those of Europe and America, dispensatories, formularies, and chemical works of Ainslie [et al.]; giving the officinal [sic] and other synonimes [sic] and scientific characters of simple substances, the preparations of the compounds, according to the various formulae, and the usual doses prescribed. With an appendix. Containing the charters, laws, and regulations, affecting the medical profession; and an outline of medical chemistry, and manipulations in the manufacture of drugs and medicinal waters; including the most recent discoveries in pharmacy / Edited by J. Rennie.
